title: 3D Amethyst Clusters
body: ## Just a resource pack that makes amethyst 3D **¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯** * Inspired by Caves and Cliffs Tweaks. # More coming soon (•̀ᴗ-) #### If you like this, see my other resource packs ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
